metadata.author: vkPathTracer
metadata.notes: Generated military warehouse layout for all lod3_very_far_r0p1 game model assets. Assets are semantically scaled to human-realistic size and staged on large or small lazy susan display turntables. The warehouse has clean tile flooring, window openings with glass panes for HDRI sky light, high-bay lights, per-model inspection spots, and a Lua-controlled sun with time_of_day_hour exposed in the scripting panel variables.
